rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLES J. WADE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Answers To Deposition Questions;
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Tuesday, April 24, 2007. Petitioner The First Unitarian Universalist society's motion to compel answers at deposition is granted. The Court finds that the questions relating to trust administration are relevant to the subject matter of the trust contest. Petitioner's right to conduct discovery is independent of the statutory duties of the trustee. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. = (BEC/610)
